dialogue_texts: Oof, my head. It feels like a heavy curtain was pulled back.
I recognize that face. Are you the shrine maiden of the Hakurei Shrine?
And the Chief Justice. Don't forget the title.
We need to talk about what you've been through.
That red aura which dissipated is called "glohm". It didn't appear on its own.
A potent substance forces anyone infected to isolate.
Somebody told me that a woman named Berenice Grieg may be behind this.
Berenice Grieg? She's probably an Order admin who used my own desire for isolation against me.
The Order's admins cause enough trouble in my book.
Stay put because I'll deal with the one who signed the warrant for this mess.
She isn't just using magic, but the hearts of those she corrupts.
Don't let her find a crack in yours.
Hah! My heart is made of donation-box wood and tax laws.
She won't find anything there but a 'Keep Out' sign.
